key_insight: SciReasoner turns structural data into explicit, inspectable tokens so a foundation model can reason about proteins, molecules, and crystals while improving prediction accuracy.
clinical_relevance: Although not a cancer-specific drug study, the approach could support earlier-stage therapeutic discovery by making structure-based target and molecule reasoning more transparent and reliable.
method: Discretizes coordinates, bonding/topology, and periodic connectivity into a unified structure-aware vocabulary.
Uses structural tokens as addressable evidence units during multimodal reasoning.
Applies the model across proteins, small molecules, and inorganic crystals for prediction and trace generation.
evidence_signal: Across 86 benchmarks, SciReasoner reports state-of-the-art performance on 67 tasks, with expert reviewers preferring or rating its reasoning traces comparable to a frontier large language model in 98% of cases.
watch_item: The reported gains are benchmark-based, so real-world impact in drug discovery will still depend on prospective validation, robustness, and integration into scientific workflows.
paper_title: Accurate, Interdisciplinary and Transparent Structure-property Understanding with Deep Native Structural Reasoning
